code:
fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> String
  mut errs = ""
  mut count = 0
  if name == ""
    errs = "empty-name"
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age < 0
    if count == 0
      errs = "negative-age"
    else
      errs = "#{errs},negative-age"
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age > 150
    if count == 0
      errs = "too-old"
    else
      errs = "#{errs},too-old"
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  if count == 0
    "ok"
  else
    "errors=#{errs}"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  println(validate("", -5))
  println(validate("Alice", 30))
  println(validate("Bob", 200))
end
